Subject: Thanks for applying to Aurora Robotics!
Body:
Hello Alhasan,

Thanks for applying to the Software Engineer position at Aurora Robotics. We have received your application and will review your profile shortly.

Our typical process: an initial recruiter screen, followed by a technical interview with the hiring manager, and a final on-site (or virtual on-site). We aim to get back to all candidates within ten working days.

In the meantime, you can read more about life at Aurora Robotics on our careers blog.

Warm regards,
The Aurora Robotics Recruiting Team
